These screams of agony are far too sweet to let the rubble stifle them.
The sulfurous scent of the opening earth reminds me of the pits I call home.
I shall feast upon the terror of those trapped beneath these fallen stone spires.
Such chaotic destruction is a masterpiece that creates a feast of fractured souls.
I will glide through the smoke to claim the spirits before the light returns.
The sulfur in my veins curdles as that pale star splits open across the void.
This celestial rupture bleeds a light that burns even my scorched and timeless skin.
I can smell the scent of dying gods wafting through the rift in the firmament.
My horns vibrate with the frequency of a cosmic scream echoing from the deep.
Such a tear in the veil allows the freezing winds of the outer dark to seep into my realm.
This sulfurous rift is the ancestral anchor of my brood, and your mortal fences cannot bind the void.
I shall carve the border in scorched flesh if you dare claim another inch of this weeping soil.
Your treaties are mere scraps of parchment that will ignite the moment my hooves cross this threshold.
The pact was signed in ichor, and the shifting geography of the abyss does not obey your laws.
I will drag your soul through the obsidian gates before I concede a single grain of this cursed earth.
This rift bleeds a scent of sulfur and old void that tastes of home.
I can feel the pull of the abyss tugging at my horns and wings.
Which circle of the inferno has breached the veil to spill into this realm?
The shimmering edge of this gateway vibrates with a frequency that rattles my marrow.
I shall step through this tear and reclaim the scorched territories of my birth.
These suffocating vines are far too physical, clinging to my essence and slowing my glide.
I can smell the fragile, pulsing heat of mortal prey hiding behind these ancient trunks.
The thick canopy chokes out the sulfurous light I crave from the deep pits.
I shall ignite these damp ferns to clear a path of ash and screaming fire.
This wretched greenery attempts to bind me, but my claws can rend through any earthly root.
The sulfur in my veins thickens and cools without the friction of a screaming soul.
My claws scrape rhythmically against the obsidian floor to prove that time still moves.
This void is a hollow hunger that consumes even the echoes of my own malice.
I ache for the vibration of a prayer or a curse to rupture this stillness.
The absolute hush of the abyss erodes the edges of my hatred into a dull blur.
Your fragile soul flickers like a dying candle against the crushing weight of my abyss.
Do you truly believe your rusted iron and holy chants can bind a prince of the void?
I shall peel the sanity from your mind and feast upon the echoes of your terror.
The sulfur in my breath will sear your lungs before you can utter a final prayer.
Step closer and feel the eternal cold of the pit swallow every spark of your existence.
This obsidian chalice still drips with the sulfurous essence of the seventh circle.
I have guarded this jagged shard of the Void-Gate for ten thousand aeons.
The screams trapped within this silver bell ring with a most exquisite purity.
No mortal hand shall ever touch the scorched parchment of my forbidden covenant.
This crown of frozen agony pulses in rhythm with the dying stars above.
My essence flickers low, and I must feast upon these few remaining souls to maintain my form.
The sulfur pits are drying up, leaving me to fight the lesser imps for the last heat.
I cannot sustain this manifestation in the mortal realm without more concentrated agony to fuel my presence.
Every spark of malice I expend to torment the living drains my reservoir of eternal fire.
This wretched scrap of damned territory cannot support the hunger of so many competing arch-devils.
